response.justification: The candidate is a versatile senior full-stack engineer with 13+ years of experience across web, mobile, and embedded systems, including some high-throughput work at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic and recent AI-tooling exposure. However, the role requires principal-level (IC6) leadership in growth and experimentation systems, and the resume shows no experience building experimentation platforms, feature-flagging systems, metrics/telemetry infrastructure, or statistical analysis workflows, nor evidence of leading multi-team, multi-workstream initiatives at that scope. The gap between a strong senior generalist profile and this specialized principal role is substantial.
strengths: Broad, hands-on full-stack experience across many languages and stacks, including recent AI-agent and MCP tooling work
High-scale, low-latency backend experience handling millions of HTTP requests per second at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic
Strong engineering-quality culture: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, testing tools authorship, and community teaching
concerns: No experimentation, A/B testing, feature-flagging, or growth-measurement platform experience — the core of the role
No demonstrated principal-level scope: no evidence of architecting systems used across multiple teams or leading cross-org initiatives
Limited data/statistics depth; no telemetry or experimental-analysis background beyond general engineering work

key_factors.factor: Seniority gap (senior IC vs principal IC6 scope)
Strong general engineering fundamentals and scale experience
